title: ADR-005 scoped but NOT implemented вЂ” credit() floor still missing in both drivers (re-issued 2026-06-02)
content: medical-bill-negotiator stabilization-triage: ADR-005 (token credit() non-negative balance floor) was authored 2026-06-01 but the fix never reached the code вЂ” confirmed 2026-06-02 that src/lib/db/pglite-store.ts credit() still does `const next = num(...) + amount` and src/lib/db/firestore-store.ts credit() still does `const next = cur + amount`, both unclamped. This is the SAME architectв†’engineer handoff-gap that left ADR-001's errors.ts unbuilt. Re-issued ADR-005 as a TEAM HANDOFF: 1 task, 3pts, scoped change = `next = Math.max(0, cur + amount)` in credit() of BOTH drivers (ledger keeps unclamped delta, clamped balance_after), plus tests/store-credit.test.ts against in-memory pglite (DB_DRIVER=pglite, PGLITE_PATH=memory://). Lesson: when a stabilization seed recurs, FIRST check whether the prior run's ADR actually shipped to code before scoping a new defect вЂ” an unimplemented prior ADR is itself the highest-priority open item.

title: Future-work: CSV formula-injection in src/lib/csv.ts (deferred, NOT in ADR-005)
content: medical-bill-negotiator: src/lib/csv.ts escapeCell() does correct RFC-4180 quoting but does NOT neutralize spreadsheet formula-injection вЂ” a cell beginning with =, +, -, @, tab or CR is executed as a formula when the exported CSV is opened in Excel/Google Sheets. Untrusted data reaches it: bill line-item descriptions (user-typed or Gemini OCR of an uploaded bill) are exported via toCsv() in src/components/AnalyzeBillPanel.tsx:395 ('counterbill-analyzed-bill.csv'). Fix when prioritized: prefix at-risk cells with a leading apostrophe or space in escapeCell. Deliberately EXCLUDED from the ADR-005 deliverable (scope discipline) вЂ” lower real-world severity (mostly self-targeted export) than the money-correctness credit() floor. Log as its own ticket; do not bundle into a stabilization fix.

Confirmed (2026-06-02): ADR-005 backend handoff again mis-routed to Brand Asset Factory вЂ” re-route to Dev Clone
content: Second observed instance of the SDLC вЂ” Medical Bill Negotiator team chain routing a backend ADR handoff (source: T: Solution Architect, 300e2d99) to T: Visual Brand Asset Factory (7b95ec9e). Payload was ADR-005 (token credit() non-negative balance floor, a money-path defect for Dev Clone), delivered via event team_handoff.7b95ec9e. Brand Asset Factory has NO matching trigger: asset generation requires a manual asset request OR brand.brief.generated + a design.md brief + image/vision vault creds (aq_image_model/aq_vision_model). None present (only Codebase connector). Correct response: do NOT fabricate asset work; report precondition_failed and state the handoff belongs to Dev Clone (implement в†’ PR в†’ QA в†’ review). Recurrence means the chain wiring, not a one-off, sends architecture.analysis.completed/team_handoff to the wrong node вЂ” worth a team routing fix.

title: Session capture (Stop) вЂ” 2026-06-02 07:28 UTC
ADR-005 credit() floor PR #1 is RED вЂ” branch cut from main without the firestore/pglite migration baseline
content: medical-bill-negotiator: The ADR-005 token credit() non-negative floor was implemented correctly (Math.max(0, cur+amount) in both pglite-store.ts:200 and firestore-store.ts:131, ledger keeps unclamped delta, idempotency intact) and pushed on branch dev-clone/credit-balance-floor with PR #1 open vs main. BUT all 5 tests/store-credit.test.ts cases fail (`pglitePath is not a function`) because the branch was cut from main while the entire pg/sqliteв†’firestore/pglite persistence migration is still UNMERGED (uncommitted on dev-clone/charge-error-detection). Branch's config.ts has no pglitePath/COLLECTION_PREFIX and DbDriver is still pg|sqlite; firestore-store imports @/lib/firestore/admin which doesn't exist on the branch; store.ts dispatches on firestore/pglite that dbDriver() never returns. LESSON: a scoped ADR fix that touches NEW files (pglite-store/firestore-store) implicitly depends on the migration that introduces them вЂ” verify that baseline is on the PR's base branch BEFORE cherry-picking the fix onto a main-based branch. The migration must land on main first; then the clamp applies cleanly. Do NOT balloon the 3-pt PR to carry the whole migration.

title: Session capture (Stop) вЂ” 2026-06-02 07:33 UTC
Code Review verdict: ADR-005 credit() floor PR #1 = REQUEST_CHANGES/INCOMPLETE (correct logic, unbuildable against main)
content: medical-bill-negotiator, 2026-06-02: Code Reviewer independently reviewed PR #1 (dev-clone/credit-balance-floor -> main) for ADR-005 token credit() non-negative floor, grounded against the actual branch tree (git show :file). VERDICT REQUEST_CHANGES/INCOMPLETE, findings_count=4, critical_count=3. The clamp logic is CORRECT and must NOT be re-flagged: pglite-store.ts:200 `Math.max(0, num(cur.rows[0]?.balance)+amount)`, firestore-store.ts:131 `Math.max(0, cur+amount)`, ledger keeps unclamped delta=amount with balance_after=next, idempotency intact, queries parameterized (no SQLi). The increment is unbuildable in isolation: pglite-store.ts:11 imports pglitePath but branch config.ts exports sqlitePath (DbDriver=pg|sqlite); firestore-store.ts:17-18 import @/lib/firestore/admin (file absent on branch) + COLLECTION_PREFIX (not exported); store.ts:80-83 dispatch on firestore/pglite that branch dbDriver() never returns. Root cause confirmed: the pg/sqlite->firestore/pglite persistence migration (config.ts rewrite, src/lib/firestore/admin.ts) is uncommitted on dev-clone/charge-error-detection, not on main or the PR branch. PATTERN (recurring): a scoped fix on NEW files implicitly depends on the migration that introduces them вЂ” verify the base branch carries that baseline before review can go green; an increment that doesn't compile is never APPROVE. Path: land migration on main first, rebase PR #1, then green.

Security scan 2026-06-02: Supabaseв†’Firebase + pglite/firestore migration is CLEAN; 5 findings carried forward, 2 HIGH PHI-egress now 4 scans unaddressed
content: medical-bill-negotiator re-scan 2026-06-02. Committed HEAD 02b6a96 unchanged since last scan; the new surface is a LARGE UNCOMMITTED working-tree migration on branch dev-clone/charge-error-detection: Supabase auth REMOVED -> Firebase only; pg.ts/sqlite.ts DELETED -> new firestore-store.ts + pglite-store.ts (DbDriver=firestore|pglite). Counts: 0 Crit, 2 High, 2 Med, 1 Low. MIGRATION VERIFIED SECURITY-CLEAN (introduces no findings): firestore/admin.ts uses Application Default Credentials (no hardcoded key) + server-only guard; pglite-store.ts ALL queries parameterized $1..$n (no SQLi); firestore-store.ts Admin SDK only; config.ts/auth-config.ts env-only no secrets; auth migration intact вЂ” session.ts:61 verifySessionCookie(checkRevoked=true), middleware edge-safe presence check + Node-runtime verify, voice route still auth-gated; secret sweep clean, .env.local gitignored. STILL-OPEN signatures (dedup, ZERO fixed): [HIGH] phi-egress-lighttrack gemini.ts:40 + gemini.ts:59 (image) + claude-cli.ts:88 -> lighttrack.ts (now VENDORED, enabled defaults true at lighttrack.ts:208); [HIGH] phi-egress-langfuse index.ts:41,44 -> observability.ts:66 input:t.input -> Langfuse Cloud; [MED] no-security-headers next.config.mjs still only serverExternalPackages; [MED] 10 moderate npm advisories (postcss<8.5.10 via next + uuid via firebase-admin->@google-cloud->google-gax chain; audit fix --force still proposes semver-major DOWNGRADES=false fixes); [LOW] claude-cli.ts:47 spawn shell:true win32 dev-only. NOTE: credit() on this branch lacks Math.max(0) floor (pglite ~:197, firestore:127) = ADR-005 correctness owned by Code Reviewer/PR#1, NOT re-flagged as security. ESCALATION: the 2 HIGH PHI-egress sinks have survived 4 scans -> raised manual_review for HIPAA/BAA decision. PATTERN holds: every observability integration on this PHI app is an egress risk class; the migration team correctly avoided adding a third sink.
